title: prospero corsicum
intro: Prospero corsicum, also known as Corsican mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving digestion, and relieving headaches. Prospero corsicum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
